name: main-cinematic-curl-noise
description: Main viewport (not playground) under Cinematic profile — curl-noise field + bloom + Penumbra. Used as a visual oracle for Wave 2 atmospheric particles. The main app's ModuleRegistry is what Cinematic acts on; the playground overlay's own registry would default to Workshop (no curl-noise).

setup.vlmDescription: Main Qualia viewport — the demo organization graph (12 person nodes in a hierarchical or social arrangement) rendered against a dark background. Behind the nodes, drifting blue points should be visible — the curl-noise particle field from Wave 2 (Cinematic profile). Each person-node should have a soft glow halo (bloom from Wave 1). No playground overlay; the standard Qualia chrome (toolbar / sidebar / properties panel) is on screen but UI is hidden via __canaryHideUI.
